other_observers: none; Sol Miller found this bird. Cole Wild also saw it.
specific_location: Outside Bobcat Ridge Natural Area just off Larimer Rd. 32C.
description: Small hummingbird, metallic green above. Longish, fairly straight bill. Black throat with a purple/violet band at lower border. Black face, chin and throat. White spot behind eye. Greenish crown. Flanks dusky gray/green. Tail dark and forked with no rufous present. White tips to outer tail feathers.Behaviors: Bird was feeding at hummingbird feeder.Call: Calling soft "tchew" as described in National GeoPlumage: adult
